summary: Completed e2e testing of Vital Signs platform - Auth, Stories, and Admin features. All core requirements verified: 3 stories displayed, no resonance/like buttons, Google auth redirects to Emergent, admin dashboard with Post Generator tab restriction working.

minor.issue: Admin endpoints use JWT-based auth (get_current_user) which doesn't work with session tokens. Session tokens work for /api/auth/me but not for admin endpoints. This is expected behavior - admin access requires full OAuth flow to get JWT.

integration_issues.issue: Regular users (student type) can access /admin page UI. The Post Generator tab is correctly hidden, but ideally non-admin users should be redirected away from /admin entirely.

action_items: Consider adding user_type check in AdminPage.tsx to redirect non-admin users away from /admin page entirely (currently only Post Generator tab is restricted)
critical_code_review_comments: AdminPage.tsx allows any authenticated user to view admin dashboard - only Post Generator tab is restricted to curejournal@gmail.com. Consider adding user_type === 'admin' check for full page access.
seed_data_creation: Created test users and sessions in MongoDB: admin-user-123 (curejournal@gmail.com) and test-user-123 (test@example.com) with corresponding session tokens
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test sessions created in MongoDB. Admin endpoints require JWT tokens from OAuth flow, not session tokens. Session tokens work for /api/auth/me endpoint. All story-related features verified: 3 stories, no resonance buttons, correct tag counts.
